description_long: This delivery robot features a robust cylindrical red body with a metallic band encircling its upper section, housing two prominent blue-lensed sensors resembling eyes. Its arms are jointed and mechanical, ending in large, articulated black and red hands with visible bolts and panel lines, suggesting strength and dexterity for handling packages. The robot stands on two sturdy, rectangular feet, each with mechanical joints and bolts, providing stability for urban navigation. A circular port is visible on one side, possibly for charging or maintenance access. The surface is predominantly red with metallic gray accents, showing signs of wear and utilitarian design. The overall appearance is industrial and functional, suitable for autonomous delivery tasks in city environments.
description: A red, cylindrical delivery robot with large mechanical arms, blue-lensed sensors, and sturdy feet, designed for urban package handling.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's blue-lensed sensors, metallic headband, and large articulated hands facing forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the circular port on the body and the arm's joint structure, with one hand partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the cylindrical body, both arms extended outward, and the robust rectangular feet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the other arm and hand, as well as the metallic headband and sensor placement.

attribute_sensor_array.location: front upper metallic band, two blue lenses

attribute_compartment_access_panel: A circular port on the right side of the body, medium-sized, with a visible seam but no obvious handle or hinge.
